creator: jreynold@sedona.ch.intel.com
text:
The attached patch brings the sysutils/flexbackup port to version 0.9.8.

Fix: 

-- 
=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=
| John Reynolds               CEG, CCE, Next Generation Flows, HLA          |
| Intel Corporation      MS: CH6-210   Phone: 480-554-9092   pgr: 868-6512  |
| jreynold@sedona.ch.intel.com  http://www-aec.ch.intel.com/~jreynold/      |
=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=--pIOJex6oiTAuLuw5DmTk0LJoP2EqabD0Cj49sw3GKc8sRIMv
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -urN flexbackup/Makefile flexbackup.new/Makefile
--- flexbackup/Makefile	Thu Oct 21 02:30:31 1999
+++ flexbackup.new/Makefile	Wed Nov  3 19:35:47 1999
@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:    flexbackup
-# Version required:     0.9.7
-# Date created:         Tue Oct 19 22:46:36 MST 1999
+# Version required:     0.9.8
+# Date created:         Wed Nov  3 17:58:26 MST 1999
 # Whom:                 John Reynolds <jreynold@primenet.com>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/sysutils/flexbackup/Makefile,v 1.2 1999/10/21 06:25:29 cpiazza Exp $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #
 
-DISTNAME=       flexbackup-0.9.7
+DISTNAME=       flexbackup-0.9.8
 CATEGORIES=     sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=   http://www.bluecherry.net/~edwinh/flexbackup/tarball/ \
-		http://members.home.com/edwinh/flexbackup/tarball/ \
+		http://members.home.com/flexbackup/tarball/ \
 		http://metalab.unc.edu/pub/linux/system/backup/
 
 MAINTAINER=     jreynold@primenet.com
diff -urN flexbackup/files/md5 flexbackup.new/files/md5
--- flexbackup/files/md5	Thu Oct 21 02:30:32 1999
+++ flexbackup.new/files/md5	Wed Nov  3 19:21:03 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (flexbackup-0.9.7.tar.gz) = 3cf9e7e78635a5a2f4a00e0e5499cf47
+MD5 (flexbackup-0.9.8.tar.gz) = 5e5042794c778358dbda88c02fcdc4f0
diff -urN flexbackup/pkg/DESCR flexbackup.new/pkg/DESCR
--- flexbackup/pkg/DESCR	Thu Oct 21 02:30:32 1999
+++ flexbackup.new/pkg/DESCR	Wed Nov  3 19:33:44 1999
@@ -14,4 +14,4 @@
      or archive to normal files rather than device
    o Nice log files.
 
-WWW: http://members.home.com/edwinh/flexbackup/
+WWW: http://members.home.com/flexbackup/
How-To-Repeat: 
 From /usr/ports/sysutils apply the patch
